subject: interactive state ownership
decision: Keep interactive state in the frontend.
reason: The frontend owns the user interaction lifecycle.

subject: reorder items in the backend
approach: Sort items before returning the response.
finding: Stable identifiers no longer referred to the expected items.

subject: platform callback delivery
approach: Test callback delivery with two supported transports.
finding: Neither transport isolated whether the platform or application consumed the callback.

subject: interactive state ownership
decision: Keep state in the frontend and send immutable requests to the backend.
reason: Immutable requests preserve ownership while making backend work deterministic.
